text:
claude -p --output-format json ... 
卧槽，claude -p 这种方式从 4 月 4 日起居然也会被 Anthropic 算作第三方用量，需要开通 Extra Usage。

https://t.co/1magMOTvxg https://t.co/sxD3by8IoR

Overheard a very smart engineer say: 

"Today I looked up something on Google and it took me to an article, and I read 3 paragraphs, and i was like no i can't do this anymore, then i went to claude"

How many lines of code do you think it takes to clone Delve? Somewhere in SF Garry Tan has 8 concurrent claude code instances up. He's on the case, give him 3 days. Matter fact give him 2 days because GStack gives him a head start.

Agent 即 Unix
来自 @pmarca 的播客 https://t.co/Ggjhy6Iiqu

都去看看你的Claude 后台

送钱了

会对应送你订阅金额的赠送金

可以在你用量用完的情况下启动这个赠送额度，但是记得要设置限额，不然肯能超了要扣你卡… https://t.co/WPngxov9VG

RT @alex_prompter: 🚨 BREAKING: MIT researchers just mathematically proved that ChatGPT can make you delusional.

And being intelligent won'…

燃烧 token 是手段，而不是目的。

按这篇论文的思想来看，应是通过燃烧 token，找到更多的“结构”。

烧完之后，要问一句：

我得到的是新“结构”还是遍地灰尘？
中国公司要求员工将自身职责记录为人工智能技能，以便用大型语言模型（LLM）替代，引发GitHub上“反技能库”（Anti-Distillation.skill）的病毒式传播
